summary: MR Module Phase 3 Testing Complete - MR Orders feature fully tested and working. Backend: 28/28 API tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows working including 3-step order form, order history, cancel request, admin MR badge display, and admin cancel approval/reject.
seed_data_creation: Multiple test orders created with 'TEST_' prefix in notes for identification. Orders created: ORD-20260316-0006 to 0010 approximately.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MR Module Phase 3 fully tested. Key features: MR Orders at /mrvet/orders with 3-step order form (customer -> products -> review), order history display, cancel request flow. Admin sees MR orders with 'MR' indigo badge and 'via {MR name}' text. Admin can approve/reject cancel requests in order detail modal. Fixed: OrderResponse model was missing source, mr_id, mr_name, cancel_requested, cancel_requested_by, cancel_reason fields - added them.

features_tested.MR Orders Page (/mrvet/orders): PASS - Page loads with order history, New Order button
features_tested.MR Order Form Step 1 (Customer Selection: PASS - Customer search and selection from territory
features_tested.MR Order Form Step 2 (Product Selection): PASS - Product list, Add to cart, quantity +/- buttons
features_tested.MR Order Form Step 3 (Review & Place): PASS - Review summary, Notes field, Place Order button
features_tested.MR Order Creation: PASS - Order created with source='mr', mr_id, mr_name fields
features_tested.MR Order History: PASS - Shows order list with order number, customer, items, status, date
features_tested.MR Cancel Request: PASS - Cancel button on pending orders, reason input, sets cancel_requested=true
features_tested.Admin Orders MR Badge: PASS - Indigo 'MR' badge next to order number for MR orders
features_tested.Admin Orders MR Name: PASS - 'via {MR name}' shown under customer info
features_tested.Admin Orders Cancel Req Badge: PASS - Red 'Cancel Req' badge on orders with pending cancellation
features_tested.Admin Cancel Approval: PASS - Approve Cancel and Reject buttons in order detail modal
features_tested.Admin Cancel Flow: PASS - Approve sets status='cancelled', Reject clears cancel_requested flag

api_tests_passed: GET /api/orders - admin sees source, mr_name fields

bug_fixed.issue: OrderResponse model missing MR-specific fields (source, mr_id, mr_name, cancel_requested, cancel_requested_by, cancel_reason)
bug_fixed.fix: Added missing fields to OrderResponse Pydantic model and updated get_orders API to include these fields in response
bug_fixed.impact: Admin Orders page now properly shows MR badge and cancel request indicators
